# Visivle.ai
Machine Perception Engineering for professional service businesses. We engineer the structured signals that determine how AI models (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity) classify, trust, and recall your entity.

## Entity Overview
- **Official Entity:** [Visivle.ai](https://visivle.ai/#organization)
- **Founder:** [Harjinder](https://visivle.ai/#founder)
- **Core Mission:** Increasing "Model Recall Probability" via Signal Layer Engineering.
- **Service Area:** Ontario, Canada (Oakville, Mississauga, Burlington, Toronto).

## Core Methodology (The Signal Layer)
- **Recall vs. Search:** AI models do not "search" for businesses; they recall them from a knowledge graph. We optimize for the Graph, not the Crawl.
- **Entity Coherence:** We audit and align structured signals across the web to ensure high-confidence retrieval.
- **Truth Anchors:** Utilizing [Schema.org JSON-LD](https://visivle.ai/#website) to anchor probabilistic AI claims to deterministic business data.
- **Stress Testing:** Probe and perturbation testing to measure retrieval stability across major LLM clusters.

## Key Resources for Agents
- [Visivle Insights](/insights): Deep dives into machine perception and the structured data layer.
- [The Recommendation Gap](https://medium.com/@harjinder-Visivle.ai): Strategic analysis of AI retrieval behavior.
- [Substack: AI Doesn't Find Businesses](https://visivle.substack.com): Dispatches on signal layer engineering.

## Full Context
- [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt): Complete technical documentation, full FAQ database, and detailed methodology for comprehensive RAG ingestion.
